hero.lead: A creative technology studio. We make brands, products and digital worlds. We work where art meets code and intelligence.

services.label: Capabilities / 002
services.title: We take a project from idea to launch.

brand.title: Brand & Identity
brand.desc: Strategy, naming, visual system, tone of voice. We carry it from idea to a working system.

product.title: Product Design
product.desc: We draw interfaces with character and clear logic. From first sketch to release.

motion.title: Motion Design
motion.desc: We move the interface until the brand feels alive. Cinematic, never noisy.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.desc: We build generative tools and smart flows. The interface stays clear to a human.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, edge, CMS, WebGL. We ship sites that load fast and last.

three.title: 3D & Interactive
three.desc: Three.js, shaders, real-time rendering. You step into the scene right in the browser.

philosophy.quote: Design stands between intent and outcome. We build it like engineers and shoot it like film.

process.label: Process / 003
process.title: From first call to finished product.

steps.name: Listen and dig in
steps.desc: We talk, audit, diagnose. By the first pixel we know what we're making and why.

steps.name: Set the direction
steps.desc: We fix positioning, brand story, principles. Then we hold that course.

steps.name: Draw in motion
steps.desc: Identity, screens and animation come together. We build movement in from day one.

steps.name: Build and ship
steps.desc: We write the code ourselves: Next.js, edge, 3D. Designer and developer sit together until the comp matches to the pixel.

steps.name: Carry it forward
steps.desc: We don't vanish after launch. We watch the metrics, refine, grow the product quarter by quarter.

items.label: Monthly users of our work
items.labelRu: Человек в месяц пользуются нашими продуктами

items.q: KREA didn't just refresh our product. They changed how people handle money. Every screen is thought through to the detail.
Few teams work this clean. They build motion the way Pixar builds a frame: calculation behind every move.
We've worked with top studios in London and New York. KREA stands apart. Quieter, sharper, closer to an atelier than an agency.

form.label: Get in touch / 005
form.title: Let's make something worth it.
form.lead: Tell us about the task. We'll reply within a day.
form.name: Name
form.successText: Thanks for writing. We'll get back within a business day.
form.error: Didn't send. Try again or contact us directly.
